overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character running through a neon-lit futuristic city plaza at night, descending from an upper pedestrian level to a dark underground corridor with NCPD graffiti.

events.description: exits narrow alley into open plaza area

agents.ego_description: sprinting through narrow passage toward the open plaza

entered.detail: tall dark concrete walls lining both sides of the narrow passage
industrial metal beams and walkways overhead
distant neon-lit skyscrapers visible at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow concrete corridor between massive buildings, emerging toward a neon-lit plaza. The walls are high concrete barriers with industrial metal structures overhead, creating a canyon-like effect.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with food vendors under glass canopy

events.description: navigates around food stalls and illuminated benches
passes parked police car with flashing red emergency lights

agents.ego_description: weaving through pedestrians and past food vendors in the plaza

notable_agents.action: police car parked with red emergency lights flashing

entered.detail: futuristic food vendor stalls with glowing displays
white police vehicle with flashing red lights
benches with glowing strip lighting underneath
massive curved digital screens displaying advertisements
large transparent canopy structure covering the plaza

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide pedestrian plaza under a massive glass canopy. The character runs past food stalls and illuminated benches where people sit, while a police car with flashing lights is parked on the left. Towering digital billboards and neon signs illuminate the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower terrace plaza with descending ramps

events.description: begins descending stairs to lower plaza level
approaching underground entrance with large mural

agents.ego_description: running down stairs into lower plaza area toward underground entrance

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the plaza terrace
ramp structure leading to lower level

segments.scene_description: The character descends a wide concrete staircase to a lower terrace level, with palm trees visible on the right. The overhead canopy recedes into the background as the plaza opens up, revealing the approach to an underground entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCPD underground entrance with graffiti mural

events.description: enters underground passage with large NCPD graffiti mural
lighting shifts from bright neon to dim artificial fluorescent

agents.ego_description: walking down ramp into the underground NCPD area

notable_agents.action: figure standing near the graffiti wall at the entrance

entered.detail: large colorful graffiti reading NCPD with a skeletal figure holding a rifle
concrete archway leading into the underground facility
triangular arrangement of digital advertisement screens on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and enters an underground facility marked by prominent NCPD graffiti. The environment transitions from the open neon-lit plaza to a covered concrete ramp with ceiling-mounted advertisement screens, where the lighting becomes noticeably dimmer.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark service corridor with vending machines

events.description: enters darker corridor with minimal fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: proceeding through dimly lit underground corridor

entered.detail: illuminated vending machines lining the right wall
sparse fluorescent light strips on the ceiling
bare concrete walls of the underground passage

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the underground facility through a dark concrete corridor illuminated only by sparse fluorescent lights and the glow of vending machines. The space is empty of people, creating a stark contrast to the busy plaza above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic urban canyon into a vibrant neon plaza before descending into a desolate underground facility. It begins with the character sprinting through a narrow concrete corridor flanked by massive buildings and industrial overhead structures, which suddenly opens into a wide pedestrian plaza beneath a massive glass canopy. As the character runs past illuminated food stalls and a flashing police car under towering digital billboards, the scene shifts toward a wide concrete staircase where the overhead canopy recedes to reveal palm trees and a lower terrace. The camera then follows the descent toward an underground entrance marked by NCPD graffiti, transitioning from the open neon light to a covered concrete ramp with ceiling-mounted advertisement screens. Finally, the environment plunges into a dim, empty corridor illuminated only by sparse fluorescent lights and the glow of vending machines, creating a stark contrast to the busy city above.
